understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle environment, completing all goal cells in each level by matching the shape, color, and rotation of a carried piece to the requirements of each goal. This must be done while managing limited stamina and lives, eventually clearing all levels to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is played on a grid with walls, floors, modifiers, and goals. Each turn, the player moves in one of four directions (north, south, east, west), consuming one stamina point. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. The player carries a piece that has three attributes: shape (0-5), color (orange, blue, green, red, in a cycle), and rotation (0, 90, 180, 270 degrees, cycling with 90° clockwise turns). Stepping on modifier tiles changes these attributes: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate only when the player's piece exactly matches the goal's required shape, color, and rotation. Stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Completing all goals in a level advances to the next level. Walls block movement, and the game provides 'blocked_directions' to indicate impassable moves. Planning efficient routes is crucial to avoid wasted stamina.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle environment, completing all goal cells in each level by matching the shape, color, and rotation of a carried piece to the requirements of each goal. This must be done while managing limited stamina and lives, eventually clearing all levels to win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is played on a grid with walls, floors, modifiers, and goals. Each turn, the player moves in one of four directions (north, south, east, west), consuming one stamina point. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. The player carries a piece that has three attributes: shape (0-5), color (orange, blue, green, red, in a cycle), and rotation (0, 90, 180, 270 degrees, cycling with 90° clockwise turns). Stepping on modifier tiles changes these attributes: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate only when the player's piece exactly matches the goal's required shape, color, and rotation. Stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Completing all goals in a level advances to the next level. Walls block movement, and the game provides 'blocked_directions' to indicate impassable moves. Planning efficient routes is crucial to avoid wasted stamina.
